text: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 Reuters : Turkey's long-term contract for importing natural gas from Iran is due to expire in July, with Enerhy Minister Bayraktar reporting that the two countries will potentially hold talks on a possible extension. "According to our forecast, we might need this gas pipeline or the gas flow from Iran for the security of supply of Turkey. There is no negotiation right now ongoing. I think they are busy with so many other things. But we might sit and discuss a potential extension." The agreement provides for the delivery of 9.6 billion cubic metres of gas a year, but actual flows have often fallen short, with Turkey importing 7.6 bcm from Iran last year. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇹🇷 🇮🇷 路透社：土耳其从伊朗进口天然气的长期合同将于7月到期，能源部长拜拉克塔尔表示，两国可能会就可能的延期进行会谈。“根据我们的预测，为了土耳其的供应安全，我们可能需要这条天然气管道或来自伊朗的天然气流。目前还没有正在进行的谈判。我认为他们正忙于许多其他事情。但我们可能会坐下来讨论潜在的延期。”该协议规定每年输送96亿立方米的天然气，但实际流量往往不足，土耳其去年从伊朗进口了76亿立方米。@wfwitness

text: Iran says ships that pay new security and safety fees will be given priority to pass through the Strait of Hormuz, while others may face delays. Source: CNN
text_zh: 伊朗表示，支付新的安保和安全费用的船只将获得优先通过霍尔木兹海峡的权利，而其他船只可能会面临延误。来源：CNN

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Trump has convened a security consultation on the Iran crisis, three days before the ceasefire expires. If no breakthrough occurs today, the chance of war resuming rises dramatically. Israeli officials said they…" ⚡️ 🇺🇸 U.S. Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff, General Dan Caine, has been spotted at the White House amid rising tensions with Iran. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇷🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普在停火协议到期前三天召开了关于伊朗危机的安全磋商。如果今天没有取得突破，战争重启的可能性将急剧上升。以色列官员表示他们……” ⚡️ 🇺🇸 美国参谋长联席会议主席丹·凯恩将军在与伊朗紧张局势加剧之际被发现在白宫。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦 The Attorney General confirmed that four people were killed on the street and one inside the supermarket by the Kiev shooter. According to Ukrainian media, the shooter has been identified as Dmitry Vasilchenkov, born in 1968 in Moscow, holding Ukrainian…" 🇺🇦 The information about the Kiev shooter's service in the Russian army has not been confirmed, said MP Alexei Goncharenko. Earlier, this information was disseminated by Ukrainian journalist Vitaliy Glagola. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦 总检察长证实，基辅枪手在街头杀害了四人，在超市内杀害了一人。据乌克兰媒体报道，枪手已被确认为德米特里·瓦西尔琴科夫，1968年出生于莫斯科，持有乌克兰……” 🇺🇦 议员阿列克谢·贡恰连科表示，关于基辅枪手曾在俄军服役的消息尚未得到证实。此前，该消息由乌克兰记者维塔利·格拉戈拉传播。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Audio of the Indian tanker Sanmar Herald pleading with Iranian forces to stop firing in the Strait of Hormuz earlier today.
text_zh: 今天早些时候，印度油轮“Sanmar Herald”号在霍尔木兹海峡恳求伊朗军队停止射击的音频。

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 Al-Hadath: Iran has informed Pakistan’s army chief that it will not give up its missile programme. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Al-Arabiya: Iran has proposed transferring its enriched uranium to Pakistani territory. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇷🇵🇰 Al-Hadath：伊朗已通知巴基斯坦陆军参谋长，它不会放弃其导弹计划。 @wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇵🇰 Al-Arabiya：伊朗提议将其浓缩铀转移到巴基斯坦领土。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇦 A transformer exploded in Kiev, causing power outages 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇦 基辅一个变压器发生爆炸，导致停电 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 Israeli Channel 12: U.S. President Trump has convened a security consultation on the Iran crisis, three days before the ceasefire expires. If no breakthrough occurs today, the chance of war resuming rises dramatically. Israeli officials said they are not taking risks and are preparing for a return to fighting in the coming days. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 🇮🇱 以色列第12频道：美国总统特朗普在停火协议到期前三天召开了关于伊朗危机的安全磋商。如果今天没有取得突破，战争重启的可能性将急剧上升。以色列官员表示，他们不会冒险，并正在为未来几天恢复战斗做准备。 @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 CNN: An Iranian official reports that they will prioritize passage for toll paying vessels, with those who don't pay tolls having their passage postponed. "Given the limitation on the number of vessels that will be allowed to pass, Iran has decided to give priority to those vessels that respond more quickly to the new Strait of Hormuz protocols and pay the costs of security and safety services." @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 CNN：一名伊朗官员报告称，他们将优先考虑支付通行费的船只，未支付通行费的船只将被推迟通行。“鉴于允许通过的船只数量有限，伊朗决定优先考虑那些对霍尔木兹海峡新协议反应更快并支付安保服务费用的船只。” @wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 Footage shows the demolition of infrastructure and buildings in the Bint Jbeil area, this morning. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 画面显示今天上午宾特朱拜勒地区的基础设施和建筑物被拆除。 @wfwitness

text: Nuno Felix Samson is an idiot This article is good occasion to remind you to revisit Samson’s excellent “The Need for Civilizational Allies in Europe”, a foundational articulation of the emerging neoclassical international order https://statedept.substack.com/p/the-need-for-civilizational-allies-in-europe https://twitter.com/DefenseAnalyses/status/2045545020132860329/photo/1 - Defense Analyses and Research Corporation tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix Samson是个白痴。这篇文章是一个很好的机会，提醒大家重温Samson那篇出色的《欧洲需要文明盟友》，这是新兴新古典国际秩序的基础性阐述 https://statedept.substack.com/p/the-need-for-civilizational-allies-in-europe https://twitter.com/DefenseAnalyses/status/2045545020132860329/photo/1 - Defense Analyses and Research Corporation 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @renaudpila : C’est peut-être un détail pour vous mais par pour Meloni. Toute vêtue de rouge, Meloni a choisi de débarquer à l’Elysée en Alfa rouge. Une première. De quoi attirer l’œil de Trump qui l’a critiquée ouvertement. Il ne faut pas la chercher https://twitter.com/renaudpila/status/2045194246689341608/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @renaudpila：这对你来说可能是一个细节，但对梅洛尼来说不是。梅洛尼身穿红色服装，选择乘坐红色阿尔法罗密欧抵达爱丽舍宫。这是第一次。这足以吸引特朗普的目光，他曾公开批评过她。千万别惹她 https://twitter.com/renaudpila/status/2045194246689341608/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 BREAKING | The U.S. military is preparing in the coming days to board Iran-linked oil tankers and seize commercial ships in international waters, expanding its naval crackdown beyond the Middle East, according to WSJ, citing U.S. officials. See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 快讯 | 据《华尔街日报》援引美国官员的话称，美国军方正准备在未来几天内登临与伊朗有关的油轮，并在国际水域扣押商船，将其海军打击行动扩大到中东以外地区。与我们一起查看最新动态： @visionergeo 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @CorporalFrisk : That’s why ’Fortunate Son’ never charted in Finland - it doesn’t matter who your parents are, you are still expected to do your part 😉 Welcome to the long chain of youngsters who have done just that, private Metsola. And thank you for pulling your shift 👍 Proud Mama. Proud European. 🇪🇺 https://twitter.com/EP_President/status/2045122872276836407/photo/1 - Roberta Metsola tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @CorporalFrisk：这就是为什么《幸运之子》从未在芬兰上榜的原因——你的父母是谁并不重要，你仍然需要尽自己的一份力量 😉 欢迎加入那些已经这样做的年轻人长链，列兵Metsola。感谢你完成你的轮班 👍 骄傲的妈妈。骄傲的欧洲人。 🇪🇺 https://twitter.com/EP_President/status/2045122872276836407/photo/1 - Roberta Metsola 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @EP_President : This is Europe at its best 🇪🇺 🇫🇮 Honouring these brave young men and women for their sense of duty, commitment, and dedication as they carry out their military service in the Finnish Defence Forces. Thank you for your service to our Europe. https://twitter.com/EP_President/status/2045117644295069822/photo/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @EP_President：这是最好的欧洲 🇪🇺 🇫🇮 向这些勇敢的年轻人致敬，感谢他们在芬兰国防军服役期间表现出的责任感、承诺和奉献精神。感谢你们为我们的欧洲所做的贡献。 https://twitter.com/EP_President/status/2045117644295069822/photo/1 推文

text: Visioner 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 India’s Foreign Ministry confirmed that two Indian-flagged oil tankers were attacked earlier today while trying to pass through the Strait of Hormuz. ➡️ India's Foreign Secretary Vikram Misri summoned Iran’s ambassador to India, Mohammad Fathali, to express serious concern and urged Tehran to ensure the safe passage of Indian-bound vessels through the strait as soon as possible. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇮🇳 🇮🇷 印度外交部证实，两艘悬挂印度国旗的油轮今天早些时候在试图通过霍尔木兹海峡时遭到袭击。 ➡️ 印度外交秘书维克拉姆·米斯里召见了伊朗驻印度大使穆罕默德·法塔利，表达了严重关切，并敦促德黑兰尽快确保前往印度的船只能够安全通过海峡。 推文

text: Visioner RT @NSTRIKE1231 : ❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 According to The Wall Street Journal, U.S. military forces are preparing in the coming days to board and potentially seize vessels linked to Iran. See the latest updates with us: @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045542795541176823/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Visioner 转推 @NSTRIKE1231：❗️ 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据《华尔街日报》报道，美国军事力量正准备在未来几天内登临并可能扣押与伊朗有关的船只。与我们一起查看最新动态： @NSTRIKE1231 https://twitter.com/NSTRIKE1231/status/2045542795541176823/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @J_Bardella : Je considère que la libre circulation dans l'espace Schengen devrait être réservée aux seuls ressortissants des pays européens. Obtenir un titre de séjour en Espagne, par exemple, ne doit pas permettre de circuler librement dans tous les pays de l'Union européenne. https://twitter.com/J_Bardella/status/2045465701977047297/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @J_Bardella：我认为申根区内的自由流动应仅限于欧洲国家的国民。例如，获得西班牙的居留许可不应允许在所有欧盟国家自由流动。 https://twitter.com/J_Bardella/status/2045465701977047297/video/1 推文

text: Nuno Felix I can get behind this Je considère que la libre circulation dans l'espace Schengen devrait être réservée aux seuls ressortissants des pays européens. Obtenir un titre de séjour en Espagne, par exemple, ne doit pas permettre de circuler librement dans tous les pays de l'Union européenne. https://twitter.com/J_Bardella/status/2045465701977047297/video/1 - Jordan Bardella tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 我支持这一点。我认为申根区内的自由流动应仅限于欧洲国家的国民。例如，获得西班牙的居留许可不应允许在所有欧盟国家自由流动。 https://twitter.com/J_Bardella/status/2045465701977047297/video/1 - Jordan Bardella 推文

text: Nuno Felix RT @ZelenskyyUa : Ukraine’s Minister of Internal Affairs Ihor Klymenko has just reported that the attacker in Kyiv who opened fire on civilians has been eliminated. All the circumstances are being established. At present, 5 people have been confirmed killed. My condolences to the families and loved ones. Ten people are currently hospitalized with injuries and trauma. All are receiving the necessary assistance. Four hostages have been rescued. We expect a swift investigation. Investigators of the National Police and the Security Service of Ukraine are working. I have instructed the Minister of Internal Affairs and the Head of the National Police of Ukraine to make all verified information in this case available to the public. tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转推 @ZelenskyyUa：乌克兰内政部长伊戈尔·克里门科刚刚报告称，基辅向平民开火的袭击者已被消灭。所有情况正在核实中。目前已确认有5人死亡。我向遇难者家属和亲人表示哀悼。目前有十人因受伤和创伤住院。所有人都在接受必要的救助。四名人质已获救。我们期待迅速调查。乌克兰国家警察和安全局的调查人员正在工作。我已经指示乌克兰内政部长和国家警察局长将此案所有经核实的信息公之于众。 推文

text: Faytuks News RT @Osinttechnical : Ships have begun using Iran's approved route through the Strait of Hormuz this morning. At least 8 tankers have managed to pass, while numerous other ships are loitering short of the crossing or have turned back. AIS via @MarineTraffic . https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045405534027661635/video/1 tweet
text_zh: Faytuks News 转推 @Osinttechnical：船只今天上午已开始使用伊朗批准的霍尔木兹海峡航线。至少有8艘油轮成功通过，而其他许多船只则在航道外徘徊或已掉头。AIS数据来自 @MarineTraffic 。 https://twitter.com/Osinttechnical/status/2045405534027661635/video/1 推文

text: Israel keeps destroying Lebanon even during the ceasefire.
text_zh: 以色列即使在停火期间也继续摧毁黎巴嫩。

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: "When you see soldiers walking around with no legs, that was Iran that did that" 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：“当你看到士兵们断腿走来走去时，那是伊朗干的” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 Head of Hezbollah's office of international relations Nawaf al-Moussawi seemingly threatened Lebanese President Joseph Aoun, saying: “He is no more important than Anwar Sadat... And that's not all; you know what happened to Anwar Sadat.” Sadat, the Egyptian president who made peace with Israel, was allegedly assassinated by Islamist extremists. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 🇮🇱 真主党国际关系办公室负责人纳瓦夫·穆萨维（Nawaf al-Moussawi）似乎威胁了黎巴嫩总统约瑟夫·奥恩（Joseph Aoun），称：“他并不比安瓦尔·萨达特（Anwar Sadat）更重要……而且不仅如此；你知道安瓦尔·萨达特发生了什么事。”与以色列实现和平的埃及总统萨达特据称是被伊斯兰极端分子暗杀的。 @wfwitness

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇺🇳🇱🇧 French President Emmanuel Macron announced that French Sergeant Chief Florian Montorio of the 17th Parachute Engineer Regiment was killed this morning in southern Lebanon during an attack on UNIFIL. Three of his comrades were wounded and have…" ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 The French Armed Forces released a photo of French Sergeant Chief Florian Montorio of the 17th Parachute Engineer Regiment, who was killed this morning, likely by a Hezbollah attack, while deployed with UNIFIL. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇫🇷🇱🇧🇺🇳🇱🇧 法国总统埃马纽埃尔·马克龙宣布，法国第17伞兵工兵团的首席中士弗洛里安·蒙托里奥（Florian Montorio）今天上午在黎巴嫩南部针对联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（UNIFIL）的袭击中丧生。他的三名战友受伤，并且……” ⚡️ 🇫🇷 🇱🇧 🇺🇳 🇱🇧 法国武装部队发布了法国第17伞兵工兵团首席中士弗洛里安·蒙托里奥的照片，他在今天上午随联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队部署期间丧生，很可能是遭到了真主党的袭击。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 Trump: "They wanted to close up the strait again, as they have been doing for years. They can’t blackmail us." 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇸 ⚡️ 🇮🇷 特朗普：“他们想再次封锁海峡，就像他们多年来所做的那样。他们无法勒索我们。” 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 Deputy spokesman for the Iranian President Tabatabaei explains why Iran closed the Strait of Hormuz one day after it was reopened. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇮🇷 🇺🇸 伊朗总统副发言人塔巴塔拜（Tabatabaei）解释了伊朗为何在霍尔木兹海峡重新开放一天后又将其关闭。 @wfwitness

text: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 The U.S. is preparing to seize Iran-linked tankers in international waters, the Wall Street Journal reports, as Washington looks to expand its operation beyond the Middle East. According to WSJ, the move is aimed at forcing Tehran to reopen the Strait of Hormuz and make concessions on its nuclear program. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: 🇺🇸 🇮🇷 据《华尔街日报》报道，美国正准备在公海扣押与伊朗有关的油轮，因为华盛顿寻求将其行动范围扩大到中东以外。据《华尔街日报》称，此举旨在迫使德黑兰重新开放霍尔木兹海峡，并在其核计划上做出让步。 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 The Lebanese information branch forces have deployed across the Cornish Al Mazraa district of Beirut. The reason remains unknown at this time. @wfwitness
text_zh: ⚡️ 🇱🇧 黎巴嫩情报部门已在贝鲁特科尼什马兹拉区（Cornish Al Mazraa）部署。目前原因尚不清楚。 @wfwitness

text: South African President Ramaphosa: Many other countries now see that real genocide is happening in Gaza as well as on the West Bank.
text_zh: 南非总统拉马福萨：许多其他国家现在也看到，加沙以及西岸正在发生真正的种族灭绝。

text: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ The gunman barricaded himself inside a Velmart supermarket, taking hostages. KORD special forces stormed the building, killed the gunman, and rescued the hostages. Ten people remain hospitalized. The attacker was reportedly a 58-year-old man originally from Moscow; he allegedly used automatic weapons, had earlier set fire to an apartment, and the motive remains unclear as investigations continue. 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 枪手把自己关在一家Velmart超市里，劫持了人质。KORD特种部队突袭了该建筑，击毙了枪手，并解救了人质。十人仍在住院治疗。据报道，袭击者是一名58岁的男子，原籍莫斯科；他据称使用了自动武器，早些时候曾放火烧毁了一间公寓，目前调查仍在继续，动机尚不清楚。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Brazilian President Lula: No president of a republic of one country can interfere in another country’s election, ask for votes for another. Where is electoral sovereignty? Where is territorial sovereignty?
text_zh: 巴西总统卢拉：任何一个国家的共和国总统都不能干涉另一个国家的选举，不能为他人拉票。选举主权在哪里？领土主权在哪里？

text: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ Multiple casualties 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 多人伤亡 🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ A shooting incident occurred today in Kyiv's Holosiivskyi district. A gunman opened fire, killing at least five people and injuring around 10 others (including a child, per some reports). 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇺🇦 ⚡️ 基辅戈洛谢耶夫区今天发生了一起枪击事件。一名枪手开火，造成至少五人死亡，约十人受伤（据部分报道称其中包括一名儿童）。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ India Expresses Deep Concern to Iran Over Firing on Merchant Ships in Strait of Hormuz; Urges Resumption of Safe Passage 🚩 @RezistanceTrench
text_zh: 🇮🇷 🇮🇳 ⚡️ 印度就霍尔木兹海峡商船遭射击一事向伊朗表达深切关注；敦促恢复安全通行。🚩 @RezistanceTrench

text: Nuno Felix Tough luck The United States opposes any efforts to incorporate European preference in the EU Defense Procurement Directive. We fully support European rearmament and a revitalization of the European defense industrial base. However, European preference in the Directive would undermine member state flexibility to make national procurement purchases, hinder European rearmament efforts, create barriers for Allies reaching NATO capability targets, and run counter to European commitments in the 2025 U.S.-EU Joint Statement on trade and Reciprocal Defense Procurement Agreements. Our full statement here: https://ec.europa.eu/info/law/better-regulation/have-your-say/initiatives/15753-Defence-simplifying-EU-rules-for-defence-and-sensitive-security-procurement/F33372886_en - Ambassador Andrew Puzder tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 真倒霉 美国反对任何将欧洲优先原则纳入欧盟国防采购指令的努力。我们全力支持欧洲重新武装和振兴欧洲国防工业基础。然而，指令中的欧洲优先原则将削弱成员国进行国家采购的灵活性，阻碍欧洲的重新武装努力，为盟国实现北约能力目标制造障碍，并违背欧洲在2025年美欧关于贸易和互惠国防采购协议的联合声明中的承诺。我们的完整声明见此：https://ec.europa.eu/info/law/better-regulation/have-your-say/initiatives/15753-Defence-simplifying-EU-rules-for-defence-and-sensitive-security-procurement/F33372886_en - 安德鲁·普兹德大使推文

text: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 It seems that we will definitely see a second round of military strikes on Iran. 🚀 🔥 Reuters reports that Iran is sending the following maritime message: "Attention all ships! Due to the US government's failure to fulfill its obligations in the negotiations, Iran declares the Strait of Hormuz fully closed again. Passage of any type of ship or state-owned company vessel through the Strait of Hormuz is prohibited." See the latest updates with us: @visionergeo tweet
text_zh: Visioner ‼️ 🇺🇲 🇮🇷 看来我们肯定会看到针对伊朗的第二轮军事打击。🚀 🔥 路透社报道称，伊朗正在发送以下海上信息：“请所有船只注意！由于美国政府未能履行谈判中的义务，伊朗宣布霍尔木兹海峡再次完全关闭。禁止任何类型的船只或国有公司船只通过霍尔木兹海峡。” 与我们一起查看最新动态：@visionergeo 推文

text: At least five people have been killed after a gunman opened fire in Kyiv’s Holosiivskyi district. Mayor Vitali Klitschko said around 10 people, including a child, were hospitalized. The attacker took hostages in a supermarket, fired at police, and was later killed.
text_zh: 基辅戈洛谢耶夫区发生枪击事件，造成至少五人死亡。市长维塔利·克利奇科表示，约有10人（包括一名儿童）被送往医院。袭击者在一家超市劫持了人质，向警察开火，随后被击毙。

text: ↩️ Reply to DD Geopolitics: "🇺🇦It is reported that the man who shot people in Kiev had been forcibly mobilized a few days ago, and today he escaped from the military unit 🔴@DDGeopolitics | Socials | Donate | Advertising" 🇺🇦 The Attorney General confirmed that four people were killed on the street and one inside the supermarket by the Kiev shooter. According to Ukrainian media, the shooter has been identified as Dmitry Vasilchenkov, born in 1968 in Moscow, holding Ukrainian citizenship. According to media reports, he previously lived in Bakhmut, Donetsk region, before relocating to the Goloseyevsky district of Kiev. Ukraine's Attorney General confirmed the Kiev shooter was 58 years old and born in Moscow, but declined to comment on media reports that he held Ukrainian citizenship. 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦 据报道，在基辅开枪射击的人几天前被强制动员，今天从部队逃跑了 🔴@DDGeopolitics | 社交媒体 | 捐款 | 广告” 🇺🇦 总检察长证实，基辅枪手在街头杀害了四人，在超市内杀害了一人。据乌克兰媒体报道，枪手已被确认为德米特里·瓦西连科夫（Dmitry Vasilchenkov），1968年出生于莫斯科，持有乌克兰国籍。据媒体报道，他此前住在顿涅茨克地区的巴赫穆特，后来搬到了基辅的戈洛谢耶夫区。乌克兰总检察长证实基辅枪手现年58岁，出生于莫斯科，但拒绝就有关他持有乌克兰国籍的媒体报道发表评论。🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇺🇦Two killed, 10 injured after a gunman opened fire on residents of Kyiv then quickly barricading himself on a shop in the city’s Holosiivskyi district. The gunmen was neutralized in the shop after taking hostages. @wfwitness" ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Ukrainian President Zelenskyy reports that five people have been confirmed killed from the attack so far. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复 WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇺🇦一名枪手在基辅向居民开火，随后迅速躲进该市霍洛西伊夫区的一家商店并设置路障，造成2人死亡，10人受伤。枪手在劫持人质后在店内被击毙。@wfwitness” ⚡️ 🇺🇦 乌克兰总统泽连斯基报告称，目前已确认有五人在袭击中丧生。@wfwitness

text: ⚡️ 🇺🇦 Two killed, 10 injured after a gunman opened fire on residents of Kyiv then quickly barricading himself on a shop in the city’s Holosiivskyi district. The gunmen was neutralized in the shop after taking hostages. @wfwitness

He previously…" 🇺🇦 It is reported that the man who shot people in Kiev had been forcibly mobilized a few days ago, and today he escaped from the military unit 🔴 @DDGeopolitics
text_zh: ↩️ 回复DD Geopolitics：“🇺🇦在基辅实施枪击的男子已被执法人员击毙。据乌克兰媒体报道，嫌疑人名为德米特里·瓦西尔琴科夫（Dmitry Vasilchenkov），1968年4月21日出生。他出生于莫斯科，拥有乌克兰国籍。他此前……” 🇺🇦 据报道，在基辅枪击路人的男子几天前被强制动员，今天从军事单位逃跑了 🔴 @DDGeopolitics

text: Nuno Felix RT @michaeldweiss : Well, looky here. Veronika Loginova, the woman in charge of Russia's anti-doping agency is the common-law wife of Dmitry Kovalev, an FSB colonel who not only works for Russia's doping program but also belongs to the same FSB directorate that that poisoned Alexey Navalny with Novichok in 2020. I suppose you can make this up, but it'd be a hard sell in any Hollywood writers' room. https://theins.press/en/inv/291614 tweet
text_zh: Nuno Felix 转发 @michaeldweiss：好吧，看看这个。负责俄罗斯反兴奋剂机构的维罗妮卡·洛吉诺娃（Veronika Loginova）是德米特里·科瓦廖夫（Dmitry Kovalev）的同居妻子，后者是一名FSB上校，不仅为俄罗斯的兴奋剂计划工作，还隶属于2020年用诺维乔克毒害阿列克谢·纳瓦利内（Alexey Navalny）的同一个FSB局。我想你可以编造这个故事，但在任何好莱坞编剧室里都很难让人信服。https://theins.press/en/inv/291614 推文

text: WarTranslated A gunman opened fire in Kyiv's Holosiivskyi district, killing at least two and wounding several including a child. He is now barricaded in a supermarket with hostages. KORD special forces on site, negotiations underway, Klitschko said. https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045518721855197315/video/1 tweet
text_zh: WarTranslated 一名枪手在基辅的霍洛西伊夫区（Holosiivskyi district）开火，造成至少两人死亡，多人受伤，其中包括一名儿童。据克利奇科（Klitschko）称，他目前带着人质在一家超市内负隅顽抗。KORD特种部队已抵达现场，谈判正在进行中。https://twitter.com/wartranslated/status/2045518721855197315/video/1 推文

text: ↩️ Reply to WarFront Witness: "⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it carried out several strikes in southern Lebanon against alleged Hezbollah members who allegedly violated the "ceasefire understandings." Troops operating south of the “Yellow Line” identified alleged fighters who approached…" ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 The Israeli military said it killed several alleged Hezbollah members who violated the ceasefire understandings and posed an immediate threat to troops in southern Lebanon today. The IAF targeted an armed group that approached Israeli forces south of the forward yellow line. In a separate incident, the IDF said it targeted a Hezbollah tunnel shaft after identifying militants entering it. @wfwitness
text_zh: ↩️ 回复WarFront Witness：“⚡️🇮🇱🇱🇧🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，在黎巴嫩南部对据称违反‘停火谅解’的真主党成员进行了多次打击。在‘黄线’以南行动的部队发现了据称接近的武装人员……” ⚡️ 🇮🇱 🇱🇧 🇱🇧 以色列军方表示，今天在黎巴嫩南部击毙了几名违反停火谅解并对部队构成直接威胁的真主党成员。以色列空军瞄准了一个接近以色列军队的前沿黄线以南的武装小组。在另一起事件中，以军称在发现武装分子进入真主党隧道竖井后对其进行了打击。@wfwitness

text: Visioner 🇺🇦 🙏 Horrible things are happening in Kyiv at this very moment. The police special forces of KORD are preparing to storm the Velmart supermarket in the Holosiivskyi district, where an armed terrorist is entrenched and has already managed to kill up to 5 people. No other information is available at this time. tweet
text_zh: Visioner 🇺🇦 🙏 此刻基辅正在发生可怕的事情。KORD警察特种部队正准备突袭位于霍洛西伊夫区的Velmart超市，一名武装恐怖分子正盘踞在那里，并已杀害了多达5人。目前没有其他信息。推文

text: ↩️ Reply to OSINT Michael A. Horowitz RT @CEMA_FR : Aujourd'hui, le sergent-chef Florian Montorio est mort pour la France dans le cadre de l'opération DAMAN, engagement français au sein de la Force intérimaire des Nations-Unies au Liban. Pris à partie par des tirs, avec sa patrouille au cours d'une mission d'ouverture d'itinéraire pour ravitailler un poste isolé de casques bleus, et malgré la prise en charge immédiate par ses camarades et les équipes médicales spécialisées, il n'a pas pu être sauvé. Au nom des armées françaises, j’adresse mes condoléances à sa famille, ses proches et ses frères d'armes du @17eRGP . J’ai également une pensée pour ses camarades blessés au cours de cette action qui ont fait preuve d'une grande bravoure. Le Sergent-chef Florian Montorio du 17eme régiment du génie parachutiste de Montauban est tombé ce matin au sud-Liban lors d’une attaque contre la FINUL. Trois de ses frères d’armes sont blessés et ont été évacués. La Nation s’incline avec respect et adresse son soutien aux familles de nos soldats et à tous nos militaires engagés pour la paix au Liban. Tout laisse à penser que la responsabilité de cette attaque incombe au Hezbollah. La France exige des autorités libanaises qu’elles arrêtent immédiatement les coupables et prennent leurs responsabilités aux côtés de la FINUL. - Emmanuel Macron tweet
text_zh: ↩️ 回复OSINT Michael A. Horowitz 转发 @CEMA_FR：今天，一级准尉弗洛里安·蒙托里奥（Florian Montorio）在法国参与联合国驻黎巴嫩临时部队（联黎部队）的DAMAN行动中为国捐躯。在执行为孤立的维和人员哨所补给的路线开辟任务时，他与巡逻队遭到火力袭击，尽管他的战友和专业医疗队进行了紧急救治，但他仍未能获救。我谨代表法国军队，向他的家人、亲友和 @17eRGP 的战友们表示哀悼。我也挂念在这次行动中受伤的战友们，他们表现出了极大的英勇。来自蒙托邦第17伞兵工兵团的一级准尉弗洛里安·蒙托里奥今晨在黎巴嫩南部针对联黎部队的袭击中牺牲。他的三名战友受伤并已被撤离。国家怀着敬意低头致哀，并向我们士兵的家属以及所有为黎巴嫩和平而战的军人表示支持。一切迹象表明，真主党应对此次袭击负责。法国要求黎巴嫩当局立即逮捕罪犯，并与联黎部队并肩承担责任。- 埃马纽埃尔·马克龙 推文
